Schema.description: Immutable append-only record of every task attempt. Never updated after write.
Schema.condition: CloudFormation Condition: IsShadowStage (only provisioned when stage=shadow)

attributes.SK: Sort key: ATTEMPT#MODULE#<moduleSlug>#<taskSlug>#<ISO-8601-timestamp> — timestamp ensures uniqueness for retakes
attributes.answers: List of submitted answers [{id, value}] — quiz tasks only; empty for attestations
attributes.score: Number 0-100 — computed quiz score (quiz tasks only)
attributes.pass: Boolean — whether score >= passing_score (graded tasks only)
attributes.attempted_at: ISO 8601 timestamp — when this attempt was recorded
attributes.learner_identity: Map: {userId, email} — snapshot of learner identity at time of attempt
